gist.headline: Redirecting the swarm
gist.blurb: Turns out some of you were still knocking on the old API's door. We added a permanent redirect so your legacy requests automatically find their way to the new gateway without dropping their payloads.
gist.summary: Implemented a 308 redirect from legacy enter.pollinations.ai endpoints to the new gen.pollinations.ai gateway.
gist.impact: Older integrations and SDK clients will automatically route to the correct endpoint without throwing 404 errors or losing POST data.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as a helpful guide or traffic director, holding a directional sign pointing towards a glowing new gateway or portal. The nomnom creature is happily following the sign.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny crossing guard hat, holding a wooden directional sign pointing towards a glowing lime green (#ecf874) portal. The round tan nomnom creature happily waddles toward the portal. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
